queries.question: Which housekeepers work for The Grand Hotel and which laundry attendants work for the same hotel?
queries.sql:
SELECT Cleaning_Professionals.Name 
FROM Cleaning_Professionals JOIN Hotels ON Cleaning_Professionals.Hotel_ID = Hotels.ID
WHERE (Cleaning_Professionals.Position = "Housekeeper" OR Cleaning_Professionals.Position = "Laundry Attendant") AND Hotels.Name = 'The Grand Hotel'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?cleaning_professionals a :CleaningProfessionals .
  ?hotels a :Hotels .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:Hotel_ID ?hotel_id_l .
  ?hotels p:ID ?id_r .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:name ?name .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:Position ?position_w .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:Position ?position_w2 .
  ?hotels p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER(STR(?hotel_id_l) = STR(?id_r))
  FILTER((((STR(?position_w) = "Housekeeper" || STR(?position_w2) = "Laundry Attendant")) && STR(?name_w) = "The Grand Hotel"))
}

queries.question: Provide a list of all housekeepers and also provide a list of laundry attendants who work for The Grand Hotel.
queries.sql:
SELECT Cleaning_Professionals.Name 
FROM Cleaning_Professionals JOIN Hotels ON Cleaning_Professionals.Hotel_ID = Hotels.ID
WHERE Cleaning_Professionals.Position = "Housekeeper" OR Cleaning_Professionals.Position = "Laundry Attendant" AND Hotels.Name = 'The Grand Hotel'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?cleaning_professionals a :CleaningProfessionals .
  ?hotels a :Hotels .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:Hotel_ID ?hotel_id_l .
  ?hotels p:ID ?id_r .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:name ?name .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:Position ?position_w .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:Position ?position_w2 .
  ?hotels p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER(STR(?hotel_id_l) = STR(?id_r))
  FILTER((STR(?position_w) = "Housekeeper" || (STR(?position_w2) = "Laundry Attendant" && STR(?name_w) = "The Grand Hotel")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display all housekeepers and laundry attendants who work for The Grand Hotel.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?cleaning_professionals a :CleaningProfessionals .
  ?hotels a :Hotels .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:Hotel_ID ?hotel_id_l .
  ?hotels p:ID ?id_r .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:name ?name .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:Position ?position_w .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:Position ?position_w2 .
  ?hotels p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER(STR(?hotel_id_l) = STR(?id_r))
  FILTER((((STR(?position_w) = "Housekeeper" || STR(?position_w2) = "Laundry Attendant")) && STR(?name_w) = "The Grand Hotel"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?cleaning_professionals a :CleaningProfessionals .
  ?hotels a :Hotels .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:Hotel_ID ?hotel_id_l .
  ?hotels p:ID ?id_r .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:name ?name .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:Position ?position_w .
  ?cleaning_professionals p:Position ?position_w2 .
  ?hotels p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER(STR(?hotel_id_l) = STR(?id_r))
  FILTER((STR(?position_w) = "Housekeeper" || (STR(?position_w2) = "Laundry Attendant" && STR(?name_w) = "The Grand Hotel")))
} }
}
